title: Steam Short Description Generator
summary: A narrow AI generator for indie developers preparing Steam store pages.
targetUser: Solo indie developers preparing a Steam page.
searchIntent: The user wants usable Steam short description copy, not a generic guide.
serpWeaknessSummary: Top results are mostly generic articles; no focused interactive generator appears.
monetizationSummary: Paid export for a Steam Page Fix Pack, plus ads and affiliate links to game marketing/localization tools.
riskSummary: Low risk. Avoid claiming it will increase wishlists or guarantee conversions.

toolConcept.oneLiner: Input your game hook and genre, get 3 Steam-ready short descriptions.

killCriteria: Discard if manual SERP review finds 3+ strong existing generators.
Do not claim it will increase wishlists.

title: Shopify Accessibility Checklist Generator
summary: A self-assessment checklist for Shopify store owners to review accessibility basics.
searchIntent: The user wants a practical checklist for their store, not a broad WCAG article.
serpWeaknessSummary: Results are educational but not tailored to store type or platform setup.
monetizationSummary: Paid export, accessibility scanner affiliate, and agency lead-gen.
riskSummary: Medium risk. Must avoid saying the store is legally compliant.

toolConcept.oneLiner: Answer store setup questions and get a prioritized accessibility review checklist.

killCriteria: Do not build if the page implies legal compliance certification.
Discard if SERP is dominated by mature scanners for the exact query.
